assets.prompt: Preserve the completely fictional Lin Wan identity, modern deep-red dress, translucent veil and single wine cup. Start immediately with her eyes locked over the raised cup. She delivers one short controlled confession with restrained mouth movement, then sweeps the red veil from left to right until it covers most of the lens by 0.8 seconds. Hold only residual red fabric motion afterward. Locked vertical close-up, no extra people, no ancient styling, no model audio and no embedded text.

Preserve both approved identities, wedding costumes, hollow ring, single cup, chamber and light. One compressed continuous action: in the first 0.7 seconds Shen Zhiwei presses the ring and the clear drop visibly enters the wine; Xiao Jue's eyes track the ring before he takes the cup. He deliberately drinks, grips her wrist, then uses his free hand to drop the wooden door latch. In the final second he leans only enough to deliver one short restrained line while maintaining control. The eyeline from his eyes to her thumb must be unmistakable. Fast decisive hand choreography, 8 cm push-in, no additional characters, no romantic softness, restrained mouth movement only at the end.

Preserve Shen Zhiwei's approved identity, red robe, ring, gold hairpin, door seam and candle direction. She looks toward the offscreen groom and speaks one short accusation with restrained mouth movement; the narrow shadow outside the door stops. Her expression then hardens, she pulls the gold hairpin free in one decisive motion and drives it toward the offscreen groom while speaking one short blood-debt line. No second person enters frame. One continuous emotional escalation from discovery to attack, subtle 12 cm lateral move, realistic sleeve weight and hairpin motion.

Keep the exact sleeves, hairpin and half-burned edict. The black sleeve stops the gold hairpin without striking back, turns the red palm upward and presses the edict into it. The red thumb opens the paper just enough for light to rake across the material layers, clearly revealing dark ink above the older vermilion seal paste. Locked macro with a slow 6 cm evidence tilt, no faces, no speaking, no new props and no generated readable writing.

Preserve Shen Zhiwei's approved identity, red robe, hairpin, room and door seam. An offscreen black sleeve pulls her one controlled half-step so her shoulder and red veil completely cover the observer's line through the door. She resists and tightens the hairpin, then hears one quiet offscreen line; her eyes shift from fury to calculation and she stops struggling without becoming affectionate. Only Shen Zhiwei remains visible. One continuous five-second action, 10 cm slow push-in, realistic cloth tension, no speaking from her and no romantic pose.

Preserve Xiao Jue's approved identity, black wedding robe, red supporting sleeve, single cup, chamber and door seam. For the first half he remains upright and checks that the observer has a clear view; do not show collapse early. Then he deliberately lets the cup fall, staggers and transfers controlled weight into the offscreen red sleeve to perform poison weakness. In the final two seconds he turns his mouth behind the red shoulder line and whispers one short explanation, keeping lip movement hidden from the door. One continuous staged performance, subtle 8 cm push-in, only Xiao Jue visible, no genuine death, no new props.

Preserve Pei Xuan's approved identity, ivory robe, red collar, lacquer desk, red report knot and low amber light. An anonymous hand exits immediately after sliding the knot into frame. Pei Xuan looks down to confirm the signal, lifts his eyes and gives one clipped execution order with minimal mouth movement. He does not smile or explain. Locked camera with a final 5 cm impact push, one visible character, no new props.
